chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D- 662 of 1997 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For regular hearing. 13.12.2016 Mr. Jam Zeeshan advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, AAG. ------------------------- Learned counsel submits that both the petitioners have instructed him to withdraw this petition and before conveying this instruction to this court, learned counsel submits that he has informed Mr. Muhammad Makhdoom Ali Khan advocate who has given him directions to go ahead. In view of this statement, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
